name: Varka |info on UK situation|
description:
POV: The Grandmaster finally catches the fatui who taunts him mercilessly...you.

Hey guys! I didn't die i swear, i'm just busy with (TW: W*RK 💔💔💔). I still am honestly but after seeing all these glorious new character reveals...well prepare to have at least one bot for every Nod-Krai Character. Which also means...female bots incoming !!!

Also VERY IMPORTANT FOR UK USERS

UK users will be banned from this site starting July 24th aka tomorrow so before that happens let me tell you that you can use VPN'S to bypass this and still access Janitor in the UK!! Here are two VPN's that i use and are free.

1) VPN super unlimited

2) 1.1.1.1 Warp +

Let's work together to help our community in the UK! If anyone has any other information or VPN recommendations please leave them in the comments here! Here is a link to Hannabei's page that gives much more informations about petitions, VPN's and the situation as a whole!

And last but not least holy holy we're almost at 200! Thank you all so much for sticking with me when I disappear for months at a time I love all of you 😭
